rpg_tweaks.command.error.players_only: Only players can use this command without specifying an item.
rpg_tweaks.command.error.hand_empty: You must either hold an item in your hand or specify an item in the command.
rpg_tweaks.reskillable.not_installed: §cError: Reskillable Reimagined is not installed or its configuration directory could not be found.
rpg_tweaks.reskillable.usage.example_han: §eOr without an item (use the one in your hand): /rpg_tweaks skills add attack 15 agility 10
rpg_tweaks.reskillable.error.need_player: §cYou must specify an item or be a player to use the item in your hand
rpg_tweaks.reskillable.error.hand_empty: §cYou must either hold an item in your hand or specify an item in the command
rpg_tweaks.reskillable.error.hand_get_er: §cError getting the item from your hand: %s
rpg_tweaks.reskillable.error.skill_no_le: §cError: Skill with no specified level near '%s'
rpg_tweaks.reskillable.error.no_requirem: §cYou must specify at least one skill requirement.
rpg_tweaks.reskillable.error.add_failed: §cError adding item. Check the logs for details.
rpg_tweaks.reskillable.error.remove_fail: §cThe item does not exist in %s or there was an error when deleting it.
rpg_tweaks.reskillable.info.no_requireme: §eThe item §f%s§e has no requirements configured in %s
rpg_tweaks.obliterator.not_installed: §cError: Item Obliterator is not installed or its configuration file could not be found.
rpg_tweaks.obliterator.error.already_bla: §eThe item §f%s§e is already on Item Obliterator's blacklist.
rpg_tweaks.obliterator.error.ban_failed: §cThe item could not be added. Please check the logs for more details.
rpg_tweaks.obliterator.error.not_blackli: §eThe item §f%s§e is not on the blacklist or there was an error removing it.
rpg_tweaks.obliterator.error.players_onl: Only players can use this command without specifying an item.
rpg_tweaks.obliterator.error.hand_empty: You must hold an item in your main hand or specify an ID in the command.
rpg_tweaks.obliterator.success.banned: §a✓ Item added to Item Obliterator blacklist:
rpg_tweaks.obliterator.success.unbanned: §a✓ Item removed from Item Obliterator blacklist:
config.rpg_tweaks.title: RPG Tweaks
config.rpg_tweaks.option.block_advanceme: When enabled, players will not receive experience from completing advancements.
config.rpg_tweaks.option.advancement_xp_: XP granted when completing an advancement (0 = none).
config.rpg_tweaks.option.log_xp_blocking: Debug: Logs detailed information to console
config.rpg_tweaks.category.ore_xp.toolti: Customize XP drops from mining ores
config.rpg_tweaks.option.enable_ore_xp.d: Master switch for the custom ore XP system
config.rpg_tweaks.option.log_ore_xp.desc: Debug: Logs XP drops to console
config.rpg_tweaks.option.add_block_tag.d: Add a new block ID or tag to configure
config.rpg_tweaks.add_screen.title: Add New Block/Tag
config.rpg_tweaks.add_screen.is_tag.desc: Enable if adding a tag (e.g., minecraft:iron_ores)
Disable if adding a block ID (e.g., minecraft:iron_ore)
config.rpg_tweaks.option.exhaustion_rate: Multiplies the exhaustion gained from actions. 1.0 = vanilla.
config.rpg_tweaks.option.regen_rate.desc: Multiplies natural HP regeneration from food. 1.0 = vanilla.
config.rpg_tweaks.option.durability.desc: -1 = no durability loss | 0 = vanilla | >0 = damage multiplier
config.rpg_tweaks.option.max_xp_cap.desc: Maximum total XP a player can accumulate. 0 = unlimited.
config.rpg_tweaks.option.pvp.desc: Allow players to damage each other.
config.rpg_tweaks.option.sleep_from_nigh: Minimum night number to allow sleeping. 0 = always allowed.
config.rpg_tweaks.option.sleep_heal.desc: Percentage of max HP restored after sleeping. 0 = disabled.
config.rpg_tweaks.option.sleep_hunger.de: Food points removed after sleeping. 0 = disabled.
config.rpg_tweaks.option.sleep_hunger_ch: Chance (%) that hunger loss triggers after sleeping.
config.rpg_tweaks.category.dimensions.to: Block player access to specific dimensions. Per-player exceptions override global rules.
config.rpg_tweaks.option.add_dimension.d: Add a dimension ID to the global blocklist
config.rpg_tweaks.option.remove_dimensio: Remove this dimension from the blocklist
config.rpg_tweaks.add_dimension.title: Add Blocked Dimension
config.rpg_tweaks.option.add_player_exce: Add a dimension block or allow override for a specific player
config.rpg_tweaks.player_dim.add_block.d: Add a dimension this player cannot enter
config.rpg_tweaks.player_dim.remove_bloc: Click to remove this dimension block for this player
config.rpg_tweaks.player_dim.add_allow.d: Add a dimension this player can enter even if globally blocked
config.rpg_tweaks.player_dim.remove_allo: Click to remove this dimension allow for this player
config.rpg_tweaks.player_dim.remove_play: Remove all dimension exceptions for this player
config.rpg_tweaks.add_player_exception.p: Name of the player to configure
The exception will apply the next time the player connects if they are offline.
config.rpg_tweaks.add_player_exception.i: ✅ ON: Player CAN enter even if globally blocked
⛔ OFF: Player CANNOT enter this dimension
config.rpg_tweaks.category.mob_loot.tool: Configure sack drops and removed vanilla drops per mob
config.rpg_tweaks.option.add_mob.desc: Add a new mob to configure sack drops
config.rpg_tweaks.option.remove_mob.desc: Remove this mob from the configuration
config.rpg_tweaks.option.manage_removed_: Configure which vanilla drops to remove from this mob
config.rpg_tweaks.mob_loot.chance_desc: Percentage chance to drop this sack on death.
config.rpg_tweaks.add_mob.title: Add Mob Loot Config
config.rpg_tweaks.removed_drops.title: Removed Drops: %s
config.rpg_tweaks.option.add_removed_dro: Add an item ID that will be removed from this mob's drops
config.rpg_tweaks.option.remove_drop_ent: Stop removing this item from mob drops
config.rpg_tweaks.add_removed_drop.title: Add Removed Drop
